narrative:
Precinct Urbana South (precinct in Champaign County) has 1,112 registered voters, with 55.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.1 percentage points.
